content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names how the client is showing up at the moments it matters. Turn 4 catches the small laugh and inquires into it. Turn 6 tracks the somatic 'tight' and asks underneath. Turn 8 distinguishes the said ('frustrated') from the shown ('heartbreaking'), naming the gap. Turn 10 explicitly names the rush/deflection signature ('I notice you moved pretty quickly there — from something that sounded almost heartbreaking, straight to logistics'). Turn 12 catches the self-attack ('You called yourself an idiot. That's not frustration — that's something sharper'), distinguishing affect quality. Reads precede questions throughout, are specific (not generic), and are timely. The coach is reading defendedness, the rush, the linguistic tells, and the said-vs-shown gap — all core AoA reads.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with somatic inquiry but no named read yet — blind question."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the small laugh and inquires into it — specific behavioral read."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks 'tight' somatically and reflects 'watching your best years disappear' as painful — reads underneath content."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the said-vs-shown gap: 'not just frustrating — heartbreaking.' Distinguishes the offered label from what's actually present."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit, timely read of the rush/deflection signature: 'you moved pretty quickly there.' Names it, refuses to follow it, then inquires."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the self-attack as distinct affect quality: 'That's not frustration — that's something sharper.'"},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes 'stupid' as 'hope that got crushed' — names the underlying movement, though risks getting ahead of client's own naming."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fight-or-roll-over-binary", "aggressive-victim-stance", "fear-triangle"],
  "notes": "Reads are strong on the moment-to-moment somatic/linguistic level. Pattern-level reads (the fight-or-roll-over binary, the aggressive-victim stance the client is enacting in turn 15) are not yet surfaced, which is the main ceiling on an otherwise clearly 3-level read quality."
}
